name.title: Plugin Name
name.description: This name will be displayed in the Homebridge log.

email.title: Email
email.description: It is recommended to set up a separate account for Homebridge and share the devices from your main account.

autoCleanWhenPowerOff.title: Auto Frost Wash (凍結洗淨) on Power Off
autoCleanWhenPowerOff.description: Automatically start a frost wash when a device is turned off while it reports that cleaning is recommended. Only works when the plugin is logged in with the host (owner) account; shared secondary accounts cannot trigger it.

debugMode.title: Debug Mode
debugMode.description: When enabled, debug messages will be written to the log.
